content.en:
"Helps to improve the innate multi-dimensional Dao body !!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He knew very well how important the Innate Multi-Dimensional Dao Body was, and even if he cultivated the Innate Multi-Dimensional Dao Body, it would be extremely difficult to improve.

He has cultivated the Kasa Wisdom Body, but since he didn't go to the Ka Ye Wisdom Tree, he wants to cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Body to the first level of the Xiaocheng realm, and there is almost no hope.

However, if a multi-dimensional treasure is obtained, it is expected to quickly improve the wisdom of the Ka Ye.

"Duowei Baohu, good thing!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this time, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon said, "Ye Tian, could it be that which extra-dimensional territory gave birth to the multi-dimensional treasure gourd?"

"Yes, it's the withered vine forest sea of the 5692nd territory!" Ye Tian said.

"The sea of dead vines and forests, some impressions. "The Tricky Wood Red Dragon remembered, but it hadn't been there.

It never expected that 03 Duowei Baohu was born in that place.

"Ye Tian, the withered vine forest sea gave birth to the Duowei Treasure Gourd, I'm afraid that many forces will want to snatch it, are you sure you can grab it?" said the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

"Be sure!"

Ye Tian said.

But the Tricky Wood Red Dragon dissuaded: "Don't fall there, if you fall, I won't be able to come out." "

He didn't know that Ye Tian had the secret of having multiple duplicate bodies, because Ye Tian had a true body, and if the real body fell, wouldn't it really fall.

That's why he was worried about Ye Tian.

"Senior Trick Wood Red Dragon, don't worry, I won't take any chances. "

Ye Tian didn't reveal too much, and left immediately.

......

"If it's an ordinary treasure, I'll just give it up, but I already know the value of the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, if I get a multi-dimensional treasure gourd, my Ka Ye wisdom body will be promoted to the first level of the small Cheng realm or even the Dacheng realm, and the Ka Ye wisdom body realm will be improved, the effect of the multi-dimensional wisdom light will be better, and it will also help me improve the extra-dimensional rules faster. "

As soon as he thought of this, he couldn't wait to snatch the Duowei Treasure Gourd immediately.

For him, the value of the multi-dimensional treasure is far more than the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, and even more than the ordinary innate multi-dimensional treasure, even if he exchanges the ordinary and complete innate multi-dimensional treasure with him, he will not exchange it.

And only he can really give full play to the value of Duowei Baohu, and he can also make himself rise quickly.

However, the thought of the withered vines and forests being occupied by those overlord-level extradimensional forces gave him a bit of a headache.

Outside of the withered vines and forests, there are many existences of the Fourth Realm, as well as a large number of Third Realms, and his cultivation in the late stage of the Third Realm, no matter how high his combat power is, he cannot compete with these overlord-level extradimensional forces.

Fortunately, those overlord-level extradimensional forces have not really attacked the withered vine forest sea, and he has hope to blend in.

"I hope I can find a suitable opportunity!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Time passed slowly, and the major overlord-level extradimensional forces in the 5000 Territory were ready to invade the Withered Vine Forest Sea.

A mysterious place.

Some extradimensional beings come together.

On the side of the 5000 Territory, the extradimensional creatures were completely suppressed by the cultivators' forces, and they didn't dare to mess around at all.

But I have to admit that the strength of the extradimensional creatures is still extremely strong.

At this time, there are thirteen extradimensional creatures gathered here, and each extradimensional creature clan is extremely powerful.

For example, the extradimensional elves are in the family.

The extra-dimensional elves stay in a treasure place in the depths of the super-dimensional void, and they usually don't come out, but their strength is very strong, if they only stay in their own territory, those fourth realms don't dare to invade at all, otherwise they will be looking for death.

But the powerhouses of the super-dimensional elf clan did not dare to come out casually, otherwise they would also be targeted by the fourth realm among those overlord-level super-dimensional forces.

The reason why it will be targeted is because the extra-dimensional elves have the wood of the mother of fog, and the value of the wood of the mother of fog is too high, and the super dimensional elf clan can even resist the invasion of the fifth realm by relying on the wood of the mother of fog.

Of course, the super-dimensional elf clan does not have the existence of the fifth realm, and the most powerful one of the fourth realm is only the existence of the peak of the fourth realm, and has the qualifications to impact the fifth realm, but they dare not really impact the fifth realm, otherwise once they fail, it will be the end of the fall.

At this time.

The fourth realm peak existence of the superdimensional elf clan - the Muya realm master is also projected here, discussing the matter of the multidimensional treasure with the fourth realm existence of the other extradimensional creatures.

That's right, the news of Duowei Baohu has been leaked.

After all, they also had spies all over the territory of the 5000th Territory, and when these spies brought the news, they naturally recognized that it was the Duowei Treasure Vine, and they guessed that the Duowei Treasure Vine was born there.

But how many multi-dimensional treasures there are in the withered vine forest, they don't know.

Even if there is only one Duowei Baohu, it is worth their desperate struggle.

"Everyone, the Duowei Treasure Gourd must be taken, if I have the Duowei Treasure Gourd, I am sure that I will cultivate the body of the Fog Mother to the Dacheng realm, and at that time, I will be able to sweep through those fourth realms of the Five Thousand Realm. There is no need to shrink into the territory of the extradimensional elves, it will occupy a huge territory and have countless resources!" said the Muya Realm Lord excitedly.

At this time, another superdimensional creature of the Fourth Realm, the Black River Realm Lord, spoke: "Muya Realm Lord, the three overlord-level forces of the Nine Colors Chamber of Commerce, the Immortal Ancient Sect, and the Duo 727 Dimensional Realm Rivers and Mountains are not simple, they all have the fragments of the innate multi-dimensional treasure, as well as the extremely powerful Fourth Realm, which is not easy to deal with, in terms of overall strength, we are at a disadvantage, otherwise we will not give up the huge territory area to them." "

The Muya Realm Lord retorted, "Even if the strength is inferior to theirs, the Withered Vine Forest Sea only allows the third realm to enter. As far as the third realm is concerned, there is a third realm in our clan who has cultivated the body of the Fog Mother, and his strength is very strong, second only to the existence of the fourth realm, and he has enough strength to compete for the multi-dimensional treasure gourd. Besides, are you really willing to give up the Duowei Bao? We work together, and if you get the Duowei Bao, we will use it together. How about we make a vow?"

The other super-dimensional creatures of the fourth realm are also excited, who doesn't want multi-dimensional treasures, as for taking risks, if they don't take any risks, how can they get a big chance!

"Okay, we are willing to cooperate, and all races will send the most elite third realm to take the opportunity to send them into the withered vine forest sea, and then compete with the third realm of those overlord-level extradimensional forces for the multi-dimensional treasure gourd. But you can't be greedy, being able to snatch a multi-dimensional treasure is considered to be a complete task!"

"Okay, that's it!"

After these fourth-realm extra-dimensional creatures discussed, they went back to gather the third-realm super-dimensional creatures in the clan and prepared to invade the withered vine forest sea.
